You'll Learn React Eventually, So Why Not Now? - Going Deeper Into JSX - (12)
You'll Learn React Eventually, So Why Not Now?

We've already met the basics of JSX in earlier chapters, but in this post we're going to dig in deeper. The goal is to hit fewer surprises while you're building, and even pick up a few handy tricks along the way — things like JSX being syntactic sugar over createElement, self-closing tags, dot-notation namespaces, why component names must start with a capital letter, and which value types JSX quietly ignores.
You'll Learn React Eventually, So Why Not Now? — React Basics: Hello React (2)

We've already taken a quick look at how React differs from Vue in terms of syntax. So now it's time to actually start getting to know React. In this post we'll set up a React environment with just a CDN, render our first "Hello React", and peek at how JSX and React.createElement relate under the hood.
